message:
refactor: replace HashMap/HashSet with BTreeMap/BTreeSet for deterministic iteration in tests and benchmarks

Migrate all test and benchmark code from HashMap/HashSet to
BTreeMap/BTreeSet to guarantee deterministic iteration order. This
eliminates a class of flaky test failures where assertion messages or
debug output would vary between runs due to hash randomization,
making CI failures difficult to reproduce locally.

Source files (test code within modules):
- src/web/handler.rs: BTreeMap for path params in FnHandler1 test
- src/web/request_region.rs: BTreeMap for path params in DELETE and
  greeting handler tests (3 occurrences)

Integration tests:
- tests/e2e_web.rs: BTreeMap for query string extraction in search
  handler and router registration
- tests/http_e2e.rs: BTreeMap for query edge case tests (empty query,
  special characters) — replaces HashMap import
- tests/http_verification.rs: BTreeMap for path param extraction
  (single param, multiple params) and query param tests (standard
  and percent-encoded) — replaces HashMap import

Benchmarks:
- benches/cancel_trace_bench.rs: BTreeSet for homology scoring seen-
  set to ensure benchmark iteration is deterministic across runs
- benches/homology_benchmark.rs: BTreeSet for persistence scoring
  (cold and warm paths), boundary matrix scoring, and full pipeline
  end-to-end benchmark (5 occurrences)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
